collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (100 total Queries, 92 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `employees`.*, `d`.`department_name` as `department_name`, `c`.`company_name` as `company_name`, `c`.`company_short_name` as `company_short_name`, `deg`.`designation_name` as `designation_name`, `s`.`shift_name` as `shift_name`, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "monday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Monday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "tuesday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Tuesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "wednesday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Wednesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "thursday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Thursday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "friday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Friday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "saturday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Saturday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "sunday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Sunday FROM `employees` LEFT JOIN `departments` as `d` ON `d`.`id` = `employees`.`department_id` LEFT JOIN `companies` as `c` ON `c`.`id` = `employees`.`company_id` LEFT JOIN `designations` as `deg` ON `deg`.`id` = `employees`.`designation_id` LEFT JOIN `shifts` as `s` ON `s`.`id` = `employees`.`shift_id` LEFT JOIN `shift_per_day` as `spd` ON `spd`.`id` = `s`.`id` WHERE ( `employees`.`date_of_leaving` is null OR `employees`.`date_of_leaving` >= ('2026-01-01') ) AND `employees`.`id` IN ('40')

SELECT `machine_override`.*, `machine_override`.`machine` as `override_machine`, `employees`.`internal_employee_id` as `internal_employee_id`, `employees`.`machine` as `default_machine` FROM `machine_override` LEFT JOIN `employees` ON `employees`.`id`=`machine_override`.`employee_id` WHERE ( `machine_override`.`from_date` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-31' OR `machine_override`.`to_date` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-31' OR '2026-01-01' between `machine_override`.`from_date` and machine_override.to_date OR '2026-01-31' between `machine_override`.`from_date` and machine_override.to_date )

SELECT `employees`.*, trim(concat(employees.first_name, " ", employees.last_name)) as employee_name, `d`.`department_name` as `department_name`, `c`.`company_name` as `company_name`, `c`.`company_short_name` as `company_short_name`, `deg`.`designation_name` as `designation_name`, `s`.`shift_name` as `shift_name`, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "monday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Monday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "tuesday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Tuesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "wednesday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Wednesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "thursday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Thursday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "friday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Friday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "saturday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Saturday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "sunday" and shift_id = employees.shift_id) as Sunday FROM `employees` LEFT JOIN `departments` as `d` ON `d`.`id` = `employees`.`department_id` LEFT JOIN `companies` as `c` ON `c`.`id` = `employees`.`company_id` LEFT JOIN `designations` as `deg` ON `deg`.`id` = `employees`.`designation_id` LEFT JOIN `shifts` as `s` ON `s`.`id` = `employees`.`shift_id` LEFT JOIN `shift_per_day` as `spd` ON `spd`.`id` = `s`.`id` WHERE `employees`.`id` = '40' LIMIT 1

SELECT `shift_override`.`shift_id` as `shift_id`, `shifts`.`shift_name` as `shift_name`, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "monday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Monday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "tuesday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Tuesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "wednesday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Wednesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "thursday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Thursday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "friday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Friday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "saturday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Saturday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "sunday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Sunday FROM `shift_override` LEFT JOIN `shifts` ON `shifts`.`id` = `shift_override`.`shift_id` LEFT JOIN `shift_per_day` ON `shift_per_day`.`id` = `shifts`.`id` WHERE `shift_override`.`employee_id` = '40' AND '2026-01-01' between `shift_override`.`from_date` and shift_override.to_date LIMIT 1

SELECT `shift_override`.`shift_id` as `shift_id`, `shifts`.`shift_name` as `shift_name`, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "monday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Monday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "tuesday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Tuesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "wednesday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Wednesday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "thursday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Thursday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "friday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Friday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "saturday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Saturday, (select concat(shift_start, ", ", shift_end) from shift_per_day where day = "sunday" and shift_id = shift_override.shift_id) as Sunday FROM `shift_override` LEFT JOIN `shifts` ON `shifts`.`id` = `shift_override`.`shift_id` LEFT JOIN `shift_per_day` ON `shift_per_day`.`id` = `shifts`.`id` WHERE `shift_override`.`employee_id` = '40' AND '2025-12-31' between `shift_override`.`from_date` and shift_override.to_date LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM `od_requests` WHERE `employee_id` = '40' AND `status` = 'approved' AND ( ( date(estimated_from_date_time) between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-01') or (date(estimated_to_date_time) between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-01') or ('2026-01-01' between date(estimated_from_date_time) and date(estimated_to_date_time) ) or ('2026-01-01' between date(estimated_from_date_time) and date(estimated_to_date_time) ) or (date(actual_from_date_time) between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-01') or (date(actual_to_date_time) between '2026-01-01' and '2026-01-01') or ('2026-01-01' between date(actual_from_date_time) and date(actual_to_date_time) ) or ('2026-01-01' between date(actual_from_date_time) and date(actual_to_date_time) ) )

queries.sql: SELECT `leave_requests`.*, trim(concat(e.first_name, " ", e.last_name)) as approved_by FROM `leave_requests` LEFT JOIN `employees` as `e` ON `e`.`id` = `leave_requests`.`reviewed_by` WHERE `leave_requests`.`employee_id` = '40' AND `leave_requests`.`status` = 'approved' AND ( (leave_requests.from_date between "2026-01-01" and "2026-01-01") or (`leave_requests`.`to_date` between "2026-01-01" and "2026-01-01") or ("2026-01-01" between `leave_requests`.`from_date` and leave_requests.to_date ) ) LIMIT 1
